Interface ServerRemoteInterface

All Superinterfaces:
Remote
All Known Implementing Classes:
ServerNetworkHandler, ServerSocketProxy
public interface ServerRemoteInterface extends Remote
Remote interface exposed by the Mesos server. Clients call these methods to create/join a lobby and to perform in-game actions (totem placement, card draws).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Adds a player to the existing lobby.
    void
    askForRank(String playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Asks the server for the global leaderboard for the given player count.
    void
    createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Creates a new game lobby with the given host player.
    void
    joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Joins an already-loaded game session as a reconnecting player.
    void
    loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Load a game if there is one
    void
    ping(PlayerDTO player)
    Heartbeat signal sent by the client to the server to prove it is still connected.
    void
    placingPlayer(PlayerDTO playerToPlace, int position)
    Places the given player's totem on the specified offer tile during the placing phase.
    void
    playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Signals that the player passes their turn without drawing a card (used when no valid market action is available).
    void
    selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the bottom market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects one extra card from the market, triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.
    void
    skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO player)
    Skips the extra draw granted by the draw-one-more building effect without picking any card.

  • Method Details

    • createGame

      void createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, IllegalStateException
      Creates a new game lobby with the given host player.
      Parameters:
      playerHost - the hosting player's data (nickname and totem color).
      PlayerNumber - the number of players required to start (2–5).
      clientRemoteInterface - the host's RMI stub for receiving push notifications.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IllegalStateException - if a lobby already exists.

    • addPlayer

      void addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, GameFullException, GameReadyToStartException, NameOrColorAlreadyTakenException
      Adds a player to the existing lobby.
      Parameters:
      playerDTO - the joining player's data.
      clientRemoteInterface - the joining player's RMI stub.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      GameFullException - if the lobby is already at capacity.
      GameReadyToStartException - if this player fills the last slot (game will start).
      NameOrColorAlreadyTakenException - if the nickname or totem color is already in use.

    • placingPlayer

      void placingPlayer(PlayerDTO playerToPlace, int position) throws RemoteException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, TileOccupiedException
      Places the given player's totem on the specified offer tile during the placing phase.
      Parameters:
      playerToPlace - the player placing their totem.
      position - zero-based index of the target offer tile.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      TileOccupiedException - if the tile is already occupied.

    • selectCardFromTopList

      void selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position) throws RemoteException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotEnoughFoodException, NotSelectableCardException, EmptyMarketException, ActionNotAvailable
      Selects a card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      player - the acting player.
      cardType - the type of card to select.
      position - zero-based index in the top row.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the card.
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card type cannot be selected.
      EmptyMarketException - if the row has no selectable cards.
      ActionNotAvailable - if it is not this player's turn.

    • selectCardFromBottomList

      void selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotEnoughFoodException, NotSelectableCardException, EmptyMarketException, RemoteException
      Selects a card from the bottom market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      player - the acting player.
      cardType - the type of card to select.
      position - zero-based index in the bottom row.
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the card.
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card type cannot be selected.
      EmptyMarketException - if the row has no selectable cards.
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerDoNothing

      void playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO playerDTO) throws Exception
      Signals that the player passes their turn without drawing a card (used when no valid market action is available).
      Parameters:
      playerDTO - the player who is skipping.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an unexpected error occurs.

    • selectExtraCard

      void selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position) throws RemoteException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotEnoughFoodException, NotSelectableCardException, EmptyMarketException
      Selects one extra card from the market, triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.
      Parameters:
      player - the acting player.
      cardType - the type of card to select.
      position - zero-based index in the relevant row.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is out of range.
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the card.
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card type cannot be selected.
      EmptyMarketException - if the row has no selectable cards.

    • skipExtraDraw

      void skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO player) throws RemoteException
      Skips the extra draw granted by the draw-one-more building effect without picking any card. Releases the server thread waiting for the player's response so the round can continue normally.
      Parameters:
      player - the player declining the extra draw.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • askForRank

      void askForRank(String playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException
      Asks the server for the global leaderboard for the given player count.
      Parameters:
      playerNumber - the number of players in the finished game, as a string.
      clientRemoteInterface - the client reference to which the server will send the leaderboard.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • ping

      void ping(PlayerDTO player) throws RemoteException
      Heartbeat signal sent by the client to the server to prove it is still connected. The server resets the missed-ping counter for this player on every call.
      Parameters:
      player - the calling player's data (used to identify the sender).
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • loadGame

      void loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, GameAlreadyLoadedException, NoGameToLoadException
      Load a game if there is one
      Parameters:
      player - player sending the request
      clientRemoteInterface - the host's RMI stub for receiving push notifications.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails
      GameAlreadyLoadedException
      NoGameToLoadException

    • joinGameLoaded

      void joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface) throws RemoteException, IllegalStateException, GameReadyToStartException
      Joins an already-loaded game session as a reconnecting player. Called after loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) has restored the saved match; each player that was in the original game must call this to re-register their RMI stub before the server can resume.
      Parameters:
      player - the reconnecting player's data (nickname must match the saved game).
      clientRemoteInterface - the player's RMI stub for receiving push notifications.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
      IllegalStateException - if no loaded game is waiting for players, or the nickname does not belong to the saved match.
      GameReadyToStartException - if this player is the last one needed to resume the game.
